MBP83-99.note: 17-mer — not in 15-mer scan. Calibration checks proximity scores of overlapping 15-mers. Genuine HLA-DR15 binder (Kappos 2000, Streeter 2015).

MBP30-44.note: ATX-MS-1467 component (Streeter 2015). MHC binding affinity not well characterised — proximity check used.

references: Kappos L et al. (2000). Nature Medicine 6:1176-1182.
Streeter HB et al. (2015). Journal of Autoimmunity 65:104-111.
Larche M, Wraith DC. (2005). Nature Medicine 11:S69-76.
